kind: reproducibility / regression-consistency (SAME verifier code path, not independent)
storedVerdicts: datasets/sony_object_inside_container_v0/verdicts_all.json (built by scripts/ingest_recordings.py via the same verify_episode)
note: Decision fields (PASS/FAIL/UNCERTAIN) reproduce the committed dataset verdicts exactly. The harness's cosmetic transitionClass label is not a decision field and is excluded here.
